Supabase connection

Your Supabase URL must look similar to https://your-project-ref.supabase.co. Do not use your service role key in this browser app.

The “Send to accounts” button sends copies of generated invoice PDFs here for off-site storage.

Office login

This uses Supabase Auth email/password. You can add staff users from the Supabase dashboard.

Edit invoice

Changes made here affect this imported invoice batch, printable PDF and outgoing email attachment.

Create booking account

Create a Supabase login for this customer so they can access the future customer portal.

This temporary password will be saved in the client profile so the office can view it later.
